questions.question: Why is the Valley of Flowers considered an ecological treasure?
questions.answer: Because it contains rare alpine plants and rich biodiversity.

questions.question: What natural conditions support plant diversity in the Valley of Flowers?
Which international organization recognizes the Valley of Flowers as a heritage site?
What type of ecosystem exists in the Valley of Flowers?
What makes the Valley of Flowers attractive to scientists?
What natural elements shape the valley’s scenic landscape?
What material forms the structure of Living Root Bridges?
Which Indian state is famous for Living Root Bridges?
Why are Living Root Bridges considered sustainable?
questions.answer: They use natural materials without harming the environment.

questions.question: Why do Living Root Bridges become stronger with age?
questions.answer: Because the roots continue to grow and thicken.

questions.question: What knowledge helped villagers create Living Root Bridges?
Which concept explains the variety of life forms in nature?
How does biodiversity support ecosystem stability?
Name one animal species associated with the Valley of Flowers ecosystem.
What environmental threat can damage natural ecosystems?
Which human activity reduces biodiversity?
What form of tourism helps preserve natural environments?
What environmental action protects fragile ecosystems?
How do Living Root Bridges demonstrate human–nature cooperation?
questions.answer: People guide living roots instead of cutting trees.

questions.question: Why are natural wonders important for environmental education?
questions.answer: They help people understand nature’s value.

questions.question: Who plays a major role in protecting natural ecosystems?
Why should natural landscapes be preserved?
questions.answer: To maintain biodiversity and natural beauty.

questions.question: What relationship does the chapter highlight between humans and nature?
Why must ecosystems be protected from exploitation?
What is the central idea of the chapter 'Spectacular Wonders'?
questions.answer: Natural beauty should be protected through responsible human actions.
